title: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]color-shifting petals[/rainbow][/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...
conditions: All players have at least 19 HP
notes:
This is a three-stage event. Each time you choose to go deeper, you take [red]unblockable[/red] HP loss and advance to the next stage with a higher reward.

[gold]Stage 2[/gold] (after first dig, losing [red]5[/red] HP): Extract Nectar for [blue]75[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold], or lose [red]6[/red] HP to go deeper.

[gold]Stage 3[/gold] (after second dig, losing [red]6[/red] HP): Extract Nectar for [blue]135[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold], or lose [red]7[/red] HP to obtain the [gold]Pollinous Core[/gold] relic.

The 19 HP minimum requirement ensures all players can survive the full [red]18 HP[/red] total cost of going all the way to the center.
